transforms.code:
site = value.capitalize() #get the panel info tags = system.tag.browse('[default]/Intake/' + site) numPanels = len(tags) numFaulted = 0 numMaint = 0 for panel in tags: fault = system.tag.readBlocking(str(panel['fullPath']) + "/Fault") if fault[0].value: numFaulted = numFaulted + 1 maintenance = system.tag.readBlocking(str(panel['fullPath']) + "/Maintenance Flag") if maintenance[0].value: numMaint = numMaint + 1 #get the battery info tags = system.tag.browse('[default]/Storage/' + site) numBatteries = len(tags) numHighVolts = 0 numHighLoad = 0 for battery in tags: voltage = system.tag.readBlocking(str(panel['fullPath']) + "/Voltage") voltageSP = system.tag.readBlocking(str(panel['fullPath']) + "/VoltageSP") if voltage[0].value > voltageSP[0].value: numHighVolts = numHighVolts + 1 load = system.tag.readBlocking(str(panel['fullPath']) + "/Load") loadSP = system.tag.readBlocking(str(panel['fullPath']) + "/LoadSP") if load[0].value > loadSP[0].value: numHighLoad = numHighLoad #get weather info currentTemp = self.parent.custom.weather.main.temp humidity = self.parent.custom.weather.main.humidity description = self.parent.custom.weather.weather[0].description markdownString = "

Total Panels: " + str(numPanels) + "

" markdownString = markdownString + "

Fauled Panels: " + str(numFaulted) + "

" markdownString = markdownString + "

Panels in Maintenance Mode: " + str(numMaint) + "

" markdownString = markdownString + "

Total Batteries: " + str(numBatteries) + "

" markdownString = markdownString + "

High Voltage Batteries: " + str(numHighVolts) + "

" markdownString = markdownString + "

High Load Batteries: " + str(numHighLoad) + "

" markdownString = markdownString + "

Current temp: " + str(currentTemp) + "°

" markdownString = markdownString + "

" + description.capitalize() + "

" return markdownString

config.script:
# Get latitude and longitude coordinates from custom prop
	lat = self.view.custom.location[0].lat
	lng = self.view.custom.location[0].long
	# Call the weather API to get weather information for coordinates above. 
	callURL = "https://api.openweathermap.org/data/2.5/weather?lat=" + str(lat) + "&lon=" + str(lng) + "&appid=af96a3049234149e6f0e5eb85a7bdfff&units=imperial"
	callResult = system.net.httpGet(callURL)
	callResult = system.util.jsonDecode(str(callResult))
	
	self.custom.weather = callResult
